customAttributes.description:
At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top card of your library. You may reveal that card. If an instant or sorcery is revealed this way, transform Delver of Secrets.
//
Insectile Aberration
Flying
customAttributes.fullType: Creature — Human Wizard // Creature — Human Insect
customAttributes.flavorText:
"Unfortunately, all my test animals have died or escaped, so I shall be the final subject. I feel no fear. This is a momentous night."
—Laboratory notes, final entry
